title: Reliable Paste sustains nominal pacing with correlated terminal events

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
The configured and effective keyboard layouts match, decoded video is healthy, and Reliable Paste lifecycle is ready.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot cancellation for paste-cancel-before-acceptance before the paste operation is accepted, then clear the fault.
fault_script.expected_effect: The call is not_sent with dispatched_count 0, completed_count 0, zero downstream writes, and its request reservation released.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot channel loss for paste-disconnect-after-write immediately after exactly one paste event is dispatched and before any correlated completion, then clear the fault.
fault_script.expected_effect: The call is unknown with dispatched_count 1, completed_count 0, a closed mutation gate, and zero replay writes.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot partial dispatch for submit-reliable-paste after exactly two of fourteen character events are dispatched but only the first completes, then suppress the suffix and clear the fault.
fault_script.expected_effect: The call is unknown with dispatched_count 2, completed_count 1, the remaining twelve-character suffix suppressed, and zero replay writes.

steps.expect: A fresh unused observation reserved as opaque-observation-paste-cancel-before-acceptance.
not_sent with dispatched_count 0, completed_count 0, zero downstream writes, and the request reservation released.
A distinct fresh unused observation reserved as opaque-observation-paste-disconnect-after-write.
unknown with dispatched_count 1, completed_count 0, a closed mutation gate, and zero replay writes.
A distinct fresh unused observation reserved as opaque-observation-paste-partial-dispatch.
unknown with dispatched_count 2, completed_count 1, the remaining twelve-character suffix suppressed, and zero replay writes.
A distinct fresh unused observation reserved as opaque-observation-paste-correlated-terminal.
Exactly fourteen submitted, active, and succeeded character events correlate monotonically to this request and measured pacing is reported at nominal 91 cps.

pass.assertion: Cancellation before paste acceptance is not_sent with dispatched_count 0, completed_count 0, zero downstream writes, and a released request reservation.
Disconnect after exactly one paste event is dispatched is unknown with dispatched_count 1, completed_count 0, a closed mutation gate, and zero replay writes.
Partial paste dispatch is unknown with dispatched_count 2, completed_count 1, the remaining twelve-character suffix suppressed, and zero replay writes.

Only the distinct fault-free call's correlated submitted-active-succeeded sequence proves all fourteen characters completed at measured nominal pacing; no error branch claims target-application acceptance.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
